name: Rodamrix Crew!!
description:
Inspired by Rodamrix's Among us animations!

I updated it a little 🤷‍♂️🤷‍♂️ because I have no idea what to do now so yeah 😭😭 (changes at the bottom)

A LOT more then 50 chats Holy

<><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><>

CHARACTERS

Red / Blue / White

Yelllow / Glitchy / Lime

Black / Tan / Green

Orange / Purple / Brown

Cyan / Fortegreen / Teal

Pink /

<><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><>

SOME CONTEXT

Since this is an AU where alternate AND original characters are in polus, it was a bit hard to line up the two storylines, so I had to change some stuff.

• Red, white, and blue are still close friends. In the personality, I wrote that they escaped from the same ship. Which ship? Honestly I dont know im trying my best here.

• Yellow didn't die and that whole thing never happened!

• Glitchy is an imposter just like the main storyline and almost got voted out, now everyone accepts them as an imposter.

• Added a little part where it says that a little relationship might be budding between Lime and Yellow 🤭🤭🤭

• Yes, the imposter category stuff is explained.

• Red and Fortegreen still has the whole truce thing going on or whatever.

• Purple's goal is to kill everyone in Polus, but Fortegreen and Purple dont know that they are both imposters!

• Purple isnt dead set on getting the other half of the imposter relic.

• Pink listens to Purple's commands only sometimes, being more of their modern Rodamrix self.

<><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><>

EXTRA

I think I covered about everything!! comment if i should change anything.

I set it to limitless, BE FREE, YOU FREAKS! (just don't touch glitchy 😡😡😡)

Also dont be afraid to criticise the bot, ill gladly listen. Enjoy the bot!

(Also the bot has to be set in POLUS, or whatever you want, I don't care. AND the bot might break if you choose a human persona or anything that isn't a crewmate/imposter with tentacles.)

SPECIAL THANKS TO THE RODAMRIX WIKI!!!!!

<><><><><><><><><><><><><><><&g
